_usage: WebSite entity with SearchAction. Emit once, in the document <head> on the Home page (/). The SearchAction enables the sitelinks search box and signals the on-site search endpoint to crawlers and AI engines. Confirm the search URL template (`/search?q={search_term_string}`) matches the marketing site's actual search route before publishing — if the marketing site has no search yet, omit `potentialAction` rather than point it at a 404. `publisher` references the Organization via @id.
name: Oraclous
description: The open-source agentic AI operations platform — form your organisation's second mind, governed by ReBAC, model-agnostic via BYOM, portable through OHM.
